KIMBALL COUNTY DISPATCHER CALLED IN REPORT OF FUNNEL CLOUD AT 215 PM MDT. DEPUTY LOCATED ON HIGHWAY 30 REPORTED A BRIEF TOUCH DOWN AT 212 PM MDT...THEN CONTINUED ON AS FUNNEL CLOUD A COUPLE MORE MINUTES BEFORE DISSIPATING. NO DAMAGE REPORTED.

SOME OF THE BUILDINGS ON THE WESTERN NEBRASKA COMMUNITY COLLEGE CAMPUS WERE FLOODED DUE TO HEAVY RAIN.
CENTER PIVOT OVERTURNED.
TORNADO LIFTED.
8 TO 12 INCHES OF MARBLE SIZED HAIL ALONG HIGHWAY 385 BETWEEN BRIDGEPORT AND ANGORA. BARRICADES PUT UP ALONG A PORTION OF HIGHWAY 385.
HEAVY RAINFALL IN BROADWATERN HAS CAUSED STREET FLOODING. ALSO MANY ROADS ARE CLOSED AROUND BAYARD DUE TO HEAVY RAIN PRODUCING WATER OVER THE ROADS.

HEAVY RAINFALL HAS CAUSED WATER OVER CURBS IN DOWNTOWN SIDNEY. THE WATER IS FLOWING INTO BUSINESSES AND HOMES. MANY RODS IN THE DOWNTOWN AREA ARE CLOSED. SIDNEY DRAW IS NOW 20 TO 40 FEET WIDE AND RUNNING FAST.

INDIAN CREEK LOCATED 3 TO 4 MILES NORTH OF BRIDGEPORT HAS OVERFLOWED ITS BANKS AND FLOWING OVER MANY COUNTY ROADS IN THE AREA. DUGOUT CREEK LOCATED ON THE NORTH SIDE OF BRIDGEPORT WAS ALSO OUT OF ITS BANKS BY 10 TO 15 FEET. THE EMERGENCY MANAGER STATED THAT THEY ARE CURRENTLY EVACUATING SOME PEOPLE ON THE NORTH SIDE OF BRIDGEPORT AS WATER IS FLOWING RAPIDLY.
OFFICIALS REPORTED THAT SEVERAL COUNTY ROADS WERE WASHED OUT IN AREAS EAST OF SCOTTSBLUFF. SOME OF THE ROADS INCLUDED STEGALL ROAD, COUNTY ROAD 28, INTERSECTION OF HIGHWAY 92 AND COUNTY ROAD 25.
WATERS ALONG WARMS SPRINGS CREEK NEAR GUERNSEY WERE RISING RAPIDLY AND FLOWING OVER RIVER ROAD. LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICIALS WERE IN THE PROCESS OF CLOSING RIVER ROAD.
PUBLIC REPORTED THAT SIDNEY DRAW WAS OUT ITS BANKS WITH WATER 8 FEET DEEP AND A QUARTER OF A MILE WIDE. WATER WAS FLOWING OVER COUNTY ROAD 8 BETWEEN KIMBALL AND CHEYENNE COUNTIES.
PUBLIC REPORTED THAT SIDNEY DRAW WAS OUT ITS BANKS WITH WATER 8 FEET DEEP AND A QUARTER OF A MILE WIDE. WATER WAS FLOWING OVER COUNTY ROAD 8 BETWEEN KIMBALL AND CHEYENNE COUNTIES.

LAW ENFORCEMENT REPORTED COUNTY ROADS 73 THROUGH 78 ALONG COUNTY ROAD 8 BETWEEN KIMBALL AND CHEYENNE COUNTIES HAVE BEEN CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING OF SIDNEY DRAW. FLOOD WATERS ALONG SIDNEY DRAW IS STILL AT 8 FEET DEEP AND A QUARTER OF A MILE WIDE.

LAW ENFORCEMENT REPORTED COUNTY ROADS 73 THROUGH 78 ALONG COUNTY ROAD 8 BETWEEN KIMBALL AND CHEYENNE COUNTIES HAVE BEEN CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING OF SIDNEY DRAW. FLOOD WATERS ALONG SIDNEY DRAW IS STILL AT 8 FEET DEEP AND A QUARTER OF A MILE WIDE.
LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICIALS HAVE REPORTED WENDOVER ROAD NORTH OF THE RAILROAD TRACK HAS BEEN CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING OF COTTONWOOD CREEK.
CHEYENNE COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT PASSED REPORT FROM SHERIFF DEPUTIES THAT WATER AT BRIDGE OVER SIDNEY DRAW ON COUNTY ROAD 87 CONTINUED TO BE 6 TO 8 FEET DEEP AND ABOUT 75 YARDS WIDE.
THIS OCCURED JUST EAST OF TOWN. CORN BROKEN OFF AND DAMAGE TO BEANS.
